title: The Myth of the 'Safe' Stream: Science, Commerce, & Humanities
excerpt: Decoding the streams for the AI Era. Why the old hierarchy of 'Science is for toppers' is dangerous.
author: MyAarohan Team
content:
For generations, the hierarchy was clear: Science > Commerce > Humanities. Science was the "Safe Stream." In 2025, this is dangerous. There is no superior stream; only the stream that is superior for you.

1. The Science Stream

The Myth: "Keeps options open." The Reality: Struggling through Physics destroys confidence.

Who is it for? High Analytical Aptitude and Curiosity. Physics/Maths requires logic and spatial reasoning. Biology requires memory retention.

2. The Commerce Stream

The Myth: "For those not smart enough for Science." The Reality: A high-precision stream for organization and data.

Who is it for? Practical, organized students who enjoy structure. Accountancy requires detail; Economics requires analyzing behavior through data.

3. Humanities (The "Dark Horse")

The Myth: "For weak students." The Reality: In the AI era, Human Skills are the most expensive commodity. Humanities trains Critical Thinking, Empathy, and Creativity—skills machines can't replicate.

The Decision Matrix

Don't choose based on "Scope" (market demand changes every 5 years). Choose based on "Fit."

  • Science: How things work. (Ferrari: High speed, high maintenance).
  • Commerce: How money works. (SUV: Reliable, sturdy).
  • Humanities: How people think. (Convertible: Open, creative).

The goal is to pick the vehicle your child is most comfortable driving for the next 40 years.
